2026-05-02.quote: The way to get started is to quit talking and begin doing.
2026-05-02.focus_tip: Identify your most important task for the day, and tackle it first thing before distractions arise.
2026-05-02.message: Embrace the new day with enthusiasm! Your efforts today build the foundation for tomorrow's successes. You've got this!
